List.String: Create Change Order from Contingent Worker Contract
System or Security Badge Access Only
Dependent in Workday for Benefit Coverage

AttributeDefinition.name: USERID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker ID

AttributeDefinition.name: FILENUMBER
AttributeDefinition.Description: Employee ID

AttributeDefinition.name: MANAGER_ID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Manager ID

AttributeDefinition.name: EMAIL_ADDRESS_HOME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home email address of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: ADDITIONAL_EMAIL_ADDRESS_HOME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Additional home email address of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: EMAIL_ADDRESS_WORK
AttributeDefinition.Description: Work email address of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: ADDITIONAL_EMAIL_ADDRESS_WORK
AttributeDefinition.Description: Additional work email address of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: ADDRESS_WORK
AttributeDefinition.Description: Work address of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: FIRST_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: First name

AttributeDefinition.name: LAST_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Last name

AttributeDefinition.name: CLASS
AttributeDefinition.Description: Combination of Position, Time Type and Employment Type

AttributeDefinition.name: DEPARTMENT
AttributeDefinition.Description: Cost center

AttributeDefinition.name: JOBCODE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Job profile

AttributeDefinition.name: JOBTITLE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Business title

AttributeDefinition.name: LOCATION
AttributeDefinition.Description: Work Location of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: COST_CENTER_HIERARCHY
AttributeDefinition.Description: Cost center hierarchy of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: HIREDATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Hire date

AttributeDefinition.name: STATUS
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent the status of worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: FULLPARTTIME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Type of employment full time or part time.

AttributeDefinition.name: TERMINATION_DATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Termination date

AttributeDefinition.name: TEAM
AttributeDefinition.Description: Team in the organization data of the worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: DIVISION
AttributeDefinition.Description: Sales channel in the organization data of worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: POSTAL_CODE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Postal Code

AttributeDefinition.name: COUNTRY
AttributeDefinition.Description: Business site's country of a worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: CITY
AttributeDefinition.Description: Business site's city of a worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: ON_LEAVE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Leave status of the worker whether on leave

AttributeDefinition.name: LEGAL_MIDDLE_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Legal Middle Name

AttributeDefinition.name: MIDDLE_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Middle Name

AttributeDefinition.name: WORKER_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker Name

AttributeDefinition.name: POSITION
AttributeDefinition.Description: Position of the Worker

AttributeDefinition.name: EMPLOYEE_TYPE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Employee Type

AttributeDefinition.name: CONTRACT_END_DATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contract end date of worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: ORGANIZATION_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Business Unit Name.

AttributeDefinition.name: COMPANY_CODE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Company Code

AttributeDefinition.name: COMPANY_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: The company under which worker belongs.

AttributeDefinition.name: LAST_DAY_OF_WORK
AttributeDefinition.Description: Last working day of a worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: COST_CENTER_REFERENCE_ID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Reference ID of organization type COST CENTER.

AttributeDefinition.name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
AttributeDefinition.Description: Business site's Address_line_1 of worker.

AttributeDefinition.name: STATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Business site's state.

AttributeDefinition.name: COST_CENTER
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent the organization name whose type is COST_CENTER

AttributeDefinition.name: FUTURE_DATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent date of hiring/termination/onboarding incase its in future

AttributeDefinition.name: FUTURE_ACTION
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent action for worker who will be getting hire/terminate/onboard in future. e.g Hire Employee

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_TELEPHONE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent home phone of the worker with device type telephone

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_MOBILE
AttributeDefinition.Description: The Personal Mobile of a user. ONLY FOR MFA USE

AttributeDefinition.name: WORK_MOBILE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent work phone of the worker with device type mobile

AttributeDefinition.name: WORK_TELEPHONE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent work phone of the worker with device type telephone

AttributeDefinition.name: CUSTOM_ID_TYPE-6-2__CUSTID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent TESS Hex ID, updates with sailpoint GUID

AttributeDefinition.name: CUSTOM_ID_TYPE-3-110__CUSTID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent Azure AD ObjectId

AttributeDefinition.name: SUPERVISORY_ORGANIZATION
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent supervisory organization of worker

AttributeDefinition.name: Address1__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Address Line 1

AttributeDefinition.name: Address2__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Address Line 2

AttributeDefinition.name: AffiliateTransfertoTFS__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Yes if transfer to TFS, Else No

AttributeDefinition.name: BusinessTitle__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Business Title

AttributeDefinition.name: CWProviderName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Primary Work Mobile Phone Number

AttributeDefinition.name: CellPhone__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Address City

AttributeDefinition.name: City__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Company ID

AttributeDefinition.name: Company__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Company ID

AttributeDefinition.name: CompanyID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Comapany Name

AttributeDefinition.name: CompanyName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Address Country

AttributeDefinition.name: Country__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Cubicle ID

AttributeDefinition.name: Cubicle__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Contingent Worker Provider Company Name

AttributeDefinition.name: DepartmentGroupName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Department Group Name

AttributeDefinition.name: DepartmentID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Department ID

AttributeDefinition.name: DepartmentName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Department Name

AttributeDefinition.name: DivisionCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Division Code

AttributeDefinition.name: DivisionName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Division Name

AttributeDefinition.name: EffectiveTransferDate__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Transfer date from Rest of Company to TFS

AttributeDefinition.name: Email__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Email - Primary Work

AttributeDefinition.name: EmployeeClass__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Provides Employee Type Category

AttributeDefinition.name: EmployeeID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Unique Workday ID for Employee/Contingent Workers

AttributeDefinition.name: EmployeeStatus__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Provides Employee Status

AttributeDefinition.name: Fax__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Fax

AttributeDefinition.name: FirstName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Legal-First Name

AttributeDefinition.name: Grade__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Job Category Band # of Workers Position

AttributeDefinition.name: HireDate__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Employee Hire Date

AttributeDefinition.name: JobDescription__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Code assigned for the Job

AttributeDefinition.name: Jobcode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Description of Job position

AttributeDefinition.name: LATEST_WORKER_RECORD__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Legal-Last Name

AttributeDefinition.name: LastName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents For workers with both Corporate Partner and Employee records, this field will pull 'Y' value for the latest one only.

AttributeDefinition.name: LenelBadgeID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Lenel Badge ID

AttributeDefinition.name: LocationCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Location Code

AttributeDefinition.name: LocationName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Location Name

AttributeDefinition.name: MailStop__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Mail Drop

AttributeDefinition.name: ManagerEmployeeID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Manager ID

AttributeDefinition.name: MiddleName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Legal-Middle Name

AttributeDefinition.name: NameSuffix__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Legal-Name Suffix

AttributeDefinition.name: Pager__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Pager Number

AttributeDefinition.name: PersonalEmailaddress__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Home usage email address

AttributeDefinition.name: PersonalStatus__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Person Status

AttributeDefinition.name: PositionNumber__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Position ID

AttributeDefinition.name: PreferredFirstname__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Preferred Name - First Name

AttributeDefinition.name: PreferredName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Preferred Name

AttributeDefinition.name: PreferredSuffixname__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Preferred Name - Social Suffix

AttributeDefinition.name: State__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Address State

AttributeDefinition.name: TerminationDate__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Employee Termination Date

AttributeDefinition.name: UserType__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Will be Blank always - Do not use

AttributeDefinition.name: WorkShiftCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents Work Shift of Employee

AttributeDefinition.name: ZipCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which represents work Address ZipCode

AttributeDefinition.name: JobProfileGroupingCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which contains the Job Profile Grouping.

AttributeDefinition.name: JobProfileGroupingDesc__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which contains the Job Profile Grouping Description.

AttributeDefinition.name: PeopleSoftID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Calculated field which contains the legacy PeopleSoft ID (EMPLID).

AttributeDefinition.name: MANAGEMENT_LEVEL
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contains the numeric Management Level of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: PillarOrgCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contains the Supervisory Org Sub Type Pillar Code of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: PillarOrgName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contains the Supervisory Org Sub Type Pillar Name of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: PillarGroupOrgCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contains the Supervisory Org Sub Type Pillar Code of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: PillarGroupOrgName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contains the Supervisory Org Sub Type Pillar Name of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: PREFERRED_LAST_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Preferred last Name Value

AttributeDefinition.name: PREFERRED_FIRST_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Preferred First Name Value

AttributeDefinition.name: PREFERRED_MIDDLE_NAME
AttributeDefinition.Description: Preferred Middle Name Value

AttributeDefinition.name: COST_CENTER_CODE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Cost center value

AttributeDefinition.name: OldPeoplesoftID__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: OldPeoplesoftID

AttributeDefinition.name: SOXTransferFlag__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: SOXTransferFlag

AttributeDefinition.name: HRSeniorityDate__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: HRSeniorityDate

AttributeDefinition.name: tmsCorporateRegionCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: tmsCorporateRegionCode

AttributeDefinition.name: Floor__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Work Floor

AttributeDefinition.name: DepartmentGroupCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Department Group ID

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_COUNTRY_CODE_ALPHA2
AttributeDefinition.Description: Two letter code (ISO_3166-1_Alpha-2_Code) of Country from Home Address

AttributeDefinition.name: WORK_COUNTRY_CODE_ALPHA2
AttributeDefinition.Description: Two letter code (ISO_3166-1_Alpha-2_Code) of Country from Work Address

AttributeDefinition.name: WORK_COUNTRY_CODE_NUMERIC3
AttributeDefinition.Description: Three letter code (ISO_3166-1_Numeric-3_Code) of Country from Work Address

AttributeDefinition.name: RehireDate__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: RehireDate

AttributeDefinition.name: tmsPersonUnionCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: tmsPersonUnionCode

AttributeDefinition.name: usertimezone__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: usertimezone

AttributeDefinition.name: LaborType__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: LaborType

AttributeDefinition.name: PayRateType__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: PayRateType

AttributeDefinition.name: StatusReason__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: StatusReason

AttributeDefinition.name: WorkerTypeCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: WorkerTypeCode

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_ADDRESS_LINE1
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home Address Line1 of the worker

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_ADDRESS_LINE2
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home Address Line2 of the worker

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_CITY
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home City of the worker

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_STATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home State of the worker

AttributeDefinition.name: HOME_POSTAL_CODE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home Postal Code of the worker

AttributeDefinition.name: WORK_ADDRESS_LINE2
AttributeDefinition.Description: Work Address Line2 of the worker

AttributeDefinition.name: TFSsynergyUser__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: TFS Synergy User Flag

AttributeDefinition.name: HomePhone__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Home Phone of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: SectionCode__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Supervisory Org Section code

AttributeDefinition.name: SectionName__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Supervisory Org Section Name

AttributeDefinition.name: SupervisoryOrganizations
AttributeDefinition.Description: Supervisory Organization List

AttributeDefinition.name: SUP_ORG_REF_ID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Supervisory Organization ID

AttributeDefinition.name: Pronoun__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Preferred Pronoun of user

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_ACTIVE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Active

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_NOT_ELIGHIRE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Not Eligible for Hire

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_NOT_ELIGREHI
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Not Eligible for Rehire

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_NOT_RETURN
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Not Returning

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_REHIRE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Rehire

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_RESCINDED
AttributeDefinition.Description: Value to determine whether the with future hire data is rescinded or not

AttributeDefinition.name: RESCINDED_DATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Rescinded date for past rescinds

AttributeDefinition.name: RESCINDED_REASON
AttributeDefinition.Description: Rescinded reason for past rescinds

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_RETIRED
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Retired

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_RETURN_UNK
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Return unknown

AttributeDefinition.name: IS_TERMINATED
AttributeDefinition.Description: Worker_Status_Data / Terminated

AttributeDefinition.name: Building__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Building

AttributeDefinition.name: CostCenterEffectiveDate__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Building

AttributeDefinition.name: ORIGINAL_HIRE_DATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Initial hire date of the user

AttributeDefinition.name: EMPLOYEE_ID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Employee ID if employee record

AttributeDefinition.name: CONTRACTOR_ID
AttributeDefinition.Description: Contingent Worder ID if contractor record

AttributeDefinition.name: ON_LEAVE_FULL
AttributeDefinition.Description: Full on leave record

AttributeDefinition.name: PAYROLL_EFFECT
AttributeDefinition.Description: Payroll Effect on leave record

AttributeDefinition.name: PAYROLL_EFFECT_FULL
AttributeDefinition.Description: Payroll Effect on leave record

AttributeDefinition.name: COMPUTED_STATUS
AttributeDefinition.Description: Computed Status

AttributeDefinition.name: TERMINATION_REASON
AttributeDefinition.Description: Termination Reason

AttributeDefinition.name: ON_LEAVE_REASON_FULL
AttributeDefinition.Description: Leave Reason Array

AttributeDefinition.name: ON_LEAVE_REASON
AttributeDefinition.Description: Leave Reason

AttributeDefinition.name: ACTIVE_STATUS_DATE
AttributeDefinition.Description: Last Update for this Record

AttributeDefinition.name: MATRIX_MANAGER
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent matrix manager of worker

AttributeDefinition.name: WORK_FAX
AttributeDefinition.Description: Represent work phone of the worker with device type fax

AttributeDefinition.name: WorkerCategory
AttributeDefinition.Description: WorkerCategory

AttributeDefinition.name: TerminationDateTimestamp__c
AttributeDefinition.Description: Termination completion date Timestamp
